parameters: she is the center of power
Olie it's from Darkness Type, right?
Her power is similar to that of the great Goigo
Let's see if you think the same after this...
Ivan, you know what to do!
pathetic, well then I'll use my lil' friend
one day while traveling between the "Other Sites" I came across this experiment
seems to be one of Sterven's creations gone wrong
I decided that I would help him
But he was still evil and he left with another one just like him that
I never got a good look at
It seems that two years ago, Roux, Masumi and Marth met him at RS Studios.
NOW SEE, OLIE, YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO!
Call me that one more time and I'll rip your head off.
hahaha, I can't anymore, I must k, kill
(I haven't heard Icebell's voice in decades.)
I see that your plan was a shoot
But I'm thankful that they will save me
Ready, now you have enough energy for a transformation,
Catigo, you know what to do...
It reminds me of when I transformed with Roux to Ruroyo
WHY THE FREAK DID YOU KILL HIM IF HE WASN'T THE TARGET!?
Cat-mo, Olie, I wish you the best
Icebell, you are the new leader of the Omi Heroes,
I know you will do better than me
Nideho, return to Atacon and give this note to Roux...
He didn't even tell me anything
I haven't even done anything back here but what is Omi Heroes?
I know it's not the best time but can we join your team?
As my first order I say, that I accept Relleza and Ivan!
I see you have done a good job
Unfortunately it is not the last,
I predict that there will be a disaster in a few more years
But it will be in another region with other heroes,
so don't worry about that yet.
You will be known as the heroes of Bineta!
